get.summary: Get all properties and its values for a given SKU

post.summary: Create a new property value for a given SKU
post.description:
Your value must correspond to the property data type.

 If the type is `Decimal`, please use point as decimal separator and comma or nothing as group separator.

 If the type is `Integer`, please use comma or nothing as group separator.

 If the type is `DateTime`, please use `YYYY-MM-dd hh:mm:ss zzz` as format, where zzz is the offset with UTC.

 If the type is `Boolean`, please send `true` or `false`.

 If the type is `Enum`, please send a valid option reference.

Requires `Items.Skus.Write` permissions

put.summary: Updates an existing property value for a given SKU
put.description:
Your value must correspond to the property data type.

 If the type is `Decimal`, please use point as decimal separator and comma or nothing as group separator.

 If the type is `Integer`, please use comma or nothing as group separator.

 If the type is `DateTime`, please use `YYYY-MM-dd hh:mm:ss zzz` as format, where zzz is the offset with UTC.

 If the type is `Boolean`, please send `true` or `false`.

 If the type is `Enum`, please send a valid option reference.

Requires `Items.Skus.Write` permissions
